title: Biodiversity: Dangote Cement partners Agencies, Stakeholders on environmental sustainability …plants 7,205 trees to commemorate the 2022 Environmental Day - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigeria’s bid to reduce carbon emissions has received a boost as Pan-African cement manufacturer, Dangote Cement Plc entered into partnership with partnered with the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) and National Environmental Standards and the Regulations Enforcement Agency (NESREA) to promote environmental sustainability. In the same vein, Dangote Cement also collaborated with the Lagos Business
html: Nigeria’s bid to reduce carbon emissions has received a boost as Pan-African cement manufacturer, Dangote Cement Plc entered into partnership with partnered with the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) and National Environmental Standards and the Regulations Enforcement Agency (NESREA) to promote environmental sustainability.
